# CWE-343 safe — Predictable Value Range from Previous Values (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-343-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"encoding/binary"
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func NextRaffleNumber(c *GinCtx) (int, error) {
	var n uint32
	if err := binary.Read(rand.Reader, binary.BigEndian, &n); err != nil {
		return 0, err
	}
	return int(n % 97), nil
}
